humanConsequence.flavorText: You typed 'Best regards' 47 times. Your soul briefly left your body.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI replied to everyone. Including your mom. And your ex.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You wrote 30 pages. Nobody will read page 2. You know this.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI generated 200 pages with graphs. The boss frames one and hangs it.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You memorized 9 orders. You got 8 wrong. Everyone loves you anyway.

aiConsequence.flavorText: A sentient coffee machine arrives. It judges your caffeine intake. Loudly.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You hit it. It works. You are now the office wizard.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI declares the printer obsolete. The printer prints one final tear.

humanConsequence.flavorText: The meeting runs 40 minutes over. But Gino's weekend story was worth it.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI condenses the meeting to a 12-second voice note. Efficiency: 100%. Gossip: 0%.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You draw a little cake. Karen cries. Happy tears. Probably.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI writes a heartfelt message referencing memories you never had with Karen.

humanConsequence.flavorText: Four hours in, you find a cell that just says 'lasagna'. You leave it. Respect.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI fixes everything in 2 seconds, then quietly deletes 'lasagna'. Monster.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You apologize 14 times. The client invites you to their kid's baptism.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI's soothing voice calms the client into a nap. Mid-sentence.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You talk to the ficus. The ficus thrives. HR watches with concern.

aiConsequence.flavorText: A drone mists the plants on schedule. The ficus misses your voice.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You teach the intern the sacred rule: never touch Gino's mug. They nod solemnly.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI onboards the intern via 74 mandatory videos. The intern ages visibly.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You lose three receipts and gain one existential crisis. Standard procedure.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI flags your 'team lunch' as suspiciously fun. Audit pending.

title: Make slides for the big pitch

humanConsequence.flavorText: You use Comic Sans ironically. The client loves it unironically. Deal closed.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI makes 300 flawless slides. The projector unionizes in protest.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You order 400 pens. Nobody knows why. The pens become currency.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI orders exactly one pen, negotiates a 3% discount, and somehow a forklift.

humanConsequence.flavorText: Escape room! Gino solves it with brute force. Everyone bonds over the trauma.

aiConsequence.flavorText: Mandatory Fun is scheduled 9:00-9:15. Attendance tracked. Joy metrics: pending.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You write an honest posting: 'the coffee is bad but the people are nice'. 400 applies.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI asks for a rockstar ninja wizard. An actual ninja shows up. He's hired.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You cry with a customer over the phone. Five stars. Best support ever.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI closes 200 tickets by marking them 'resolved'. Technically true.

humanConsequence.flavorText: The backup is a USB stick taped under a desk. It has a smiley on it. It works.

aiConsequence.flavorText: Backed up to 14 redundant clouds. The USB stick is given a retirement party.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You find a 2019 yogurt. It has a name now. You keep it as a pet.

aiConsequence.flavorText: A drone purges everything, including Gino's lasagna. A war crime, frankly.

humanConsequence.flavorText: It works on your machine. So you bring your machine. Standing ovation.

aiConsequence.flavorText: Flawless demo. The client asks if humans still work here. Awkward silence.

humanConsequence.flavorText: Your high school French vs a client from Marseille. Somehow, a friendship.

aiConsequence.flavorText: Perfect translation, including the passive-aggressive tone. Especially that.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You turn it off and on again. Applause. You are carried around the office.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The wifi becomes sentient and demands a better SSID. It is now 'Wi-Fry 2.0'.

humanConsequence.flavorText: A doodle with 47 options. The meeting happens in 3 weeks. Democracy.

aiConsequence.flavorText: Everyone is booked at 7:00 AM. Attendance: 100%. Fear: also 100%.

humanConsequence.flavorText: Twenty minutes of football talk at the cooler. Morale +100. Water: forgotten.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The cooler now dispenses electrolyte-optimized fluid and small talk: 'weather.exe'.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You praise everyone and nobody gets a raise, but there are hugs. So many hugs.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI ranks employees by keystrokes. The winner is a cat asleep on a keyboard.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You adjust 14 chairs. Gino's has been at 'wrong' since 2011. He requests it stays that way.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI declares all spines 'suboptimal'. Mandatory posture. The office now sits like a screenshot of a stock photo.

humanConsequence.flavorText: Your headline: 'Printer Still Alive, Week 43'. Highest open rate in company history.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI sends a personalized newsletter to each employee. Karen's is just cat facts. She's thrilled. It knows too much.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You send a fake phishing mail. Gino replies with his password 'to help the test'. Training extended.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI's fake phishing is TOO good. Even the AI falls for it. Somewhere, a paradox quietly forms.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You propose alternating Tuesdays. Both parties cry. There is a handshake. A plaque is discussed.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI auctions the spot dynamically. Surge pricing at 8:55 AM. The bike rack has never looked so good.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You set it to 22.5. Both factions hate it equally. In the office, that's called peace.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI optimizes per-desk microclimates. Gino's desk is now technically a biome. It has weather.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You add a blooper reel at the end. The CEO laughs so hard the Q3 numbers are forgotten. Mission accomplished.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI generates a 90-minute keynote titled 'Humans: a Retrospective'. HR asks it to 'read the room'. It reads the room. Out loud.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You walk desk to desk. You learn three birthdays, one divorce, and that Karen's password was 'Karen2019!'. It is now 'Karen2026!'.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI issues 64-character passwords. Sticky notes bloom on every monitor like spring. Security: technically worse.

humanConsequence.flavorText: Gino brings lasagna to a bake sale. Nobody objects. It wins. It always wins.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI 3D-prints nutritionally complete 'cake units'. They stack beautifully. Nobody eats one. The lasagna watches, victorious.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You hang 'HANG IN THERE' with an actual photo of the office cat hanging in there. Morale: measurable spike.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI generates posters A/B-tested for compliance: 'PRODUCTIVITY IS JOY'. The font is somehow watching you.

humanConsequence.flavorText: Eleven orders, four dietary philosophies, one 'surprise me'. You return a hero, only slightly wrong.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI orders the caloric optimum: eleven identical grey bowls. Delicious, it insists. It cannot taste.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You close ticket #1: 'app is haunted (2019)'. It was the printer all along. The team holds a small ceremony.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The AI marks every bug 'works as intended'. Philosophically, it argues, all software behaves exactly as written.

humanConsequence.flavorText: You overwatered a cactus. HOW. The ficus pretends not to know you. The intern names it 'Spike II' anyway.

aiConsequence.flavorText: The drone administers 0.7 ml of water and a motivational chime. The cactus thrives, joylessly, on schedule.
